basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIRDH Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute for Research in Digital Health (ICMR NIRDH)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute for Research in Digital Health (ICMR NIRDH) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Consultant (Epidemiology) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation will be provided as per the guidelines of ICMR.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in medical sciences (MBBS/BDS/BAMS/BHMS) or similar bachelor's degree with post-graduation in Public Health/Community Medicine/Epidemiology/Health Care Management/Health Administration/Clinical Research/Population Sciences/any other similar post-graduation
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in medical sciences (MBBS/BDS/BAMS/BHMS) or similar bachelor's degree with post-graduation (degree/diploma/program) in Public Health/Community Medicine/Epidemiology/Health Care Management/ Health Administration/Clinical Research/ Population Sciences/any other similar post-graduation (degree/diploma/program). Minimum 3 years of experience in disease surveillance/public health epidemiology/public health research/experience under NACP at National/State-level is preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICMR NIRDH Consultant (Epidemiology) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICMR NIRDH to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR NIRDH Consultant (Epidemiology) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Consultant (Epidemiology) post is 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant (Epidemiology) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in medical sciences (MBBS/BDS/BAMS/BHMS) or a similar bachelor's degree with a post-graduation in Public Health, Community Medicine, Epidemiology, or related fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Consultant (Epidemiology) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant (Epidemiology) post is 45 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Epidemiology) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 120900 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant (Epidemiology) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Consultant (Epidemiology) post announced in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Consultant (Epidemiology) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Consultant (Epidemiology) post will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at the National Institute for Research in Digital Health (ICMR NIRDH).

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of ICMR NIRDH?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Institute for Research in Digital Health (ICMR NIRDH) is https://nims.icmr.org.in.
